name: Praetorian Acquisition Corp.
summary: PART I . Overview We are a blank check company incorporated on September29, 2025 as a Cayman Islands exempted company and formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses.
